title: Combat Companion
description: A persistent tactical HUD for D&D 5e – action economy, ability scores, skills, conditions, reactions list, spells with slots, weapon attacks, saving throws, features & abilities, and more. v1.6.6: Fixed [object Object] in weapon damage fallback chains (attack.parts/damage.parts); fixed action/bonus out-of-combat toggle writing to wrong flag name; fixed spell popup base damage to use _fmtDie (bonus handling + @mod resolution); added @mod resolution to weapon popup damage; added versatile + flattenObject fallbacks to spell popup damage; extracted shared _weaponProperties helper (deduplicated ~13 lines × 2 locations).
